name: Ann Street Checkpoint
description: Two Redcoats stand at a lantern-lit barrier of sawhorses across Ann Street, with Captain Aldrich behind them making notes in a small book. The light catches their bayonets and the brass buttons of their coats.
atmosphericDetails: The lantern is bright enough to see faces clearly — and to be seen.
A small queue of late-night travelers stands waiting, their breath misting in the April cold.
One soldier is young, barely older than Nathaniel, and keeps glancing toward the Common.
